results.title: Breast brachytherapy.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 33353845. 2021/09/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Episcleral plaque brachytherapy is a treatment method for ocular 
tumors that involves placing radionuclide sources directly on or around the 
tumor using an episcleral plaque. This technique offers the advantage of a 
highly focused radiation dose, minimizing exposure to critical eye structures. 
Various radionuclides such as I-125, Ru-106, and Pd-103 are used in ocular 
brachytherapy. The choice of radionuclides depends on several factors, suc
